violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the following were observed to have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - Back kitchen hand sink - Pizza prep cooler doors/gaskets Non-food-contact surfaces are to be cleaned at a frequency to keep them clean and to preclude the buildup of soil and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2025

At the time of inspection, documentation of approval and log sheets for pizza slices being held using Time as a Public Health Control were not available/complete. Log sheets/documentation are to be completed every day when pizza is held using Time as a Public Health Control and are to be made readily available and provided to the REGULATORY AUTHORITY upon request. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024

Food items packaged/repackaged in the food establishment were observed to have labels lacking complete information (Lacking name of business, address, approximate weight). Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients and allergens, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 02/22/2024
